title: Asukas Date
wikitext:
[]: Asuka's Date             Quote Post by Tumbling Down » Wed Dec 24, 2014 9:11 pm So Asuka went on a date with an unseen boy in Episode 15 then ditched him. Wassup widdat? I'm sure there's something more significant to it than just Asuka being a jerk.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Wed Dec 24, 2014 9:13 pm Her giblets quiver for the Lesser Ikari. None other will suffice.

[]:             Quote Post by Rosenakahara » Wed Dec 24, 2014 9:14 pm She did? OK again i probably shouldn't be posting because im both drunk and tired here but if that was the episode where she kissed Shinji it probably had something to do with that, in terms of theme anyway not in-universe.......probably. Then again he doesn't have a name, aka: he doesn't matter.

[]:             Quote Post by Sorrow » Wed Dec 24, 2014 9:21 pm I believe it's generally agreed that she'd rather be spending time with Shinji, despite what she may say. She's just more interested in him being interested in her, than she is interested in someone who is interested in her. It's just not as interesting.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Wed Dec 24, 2014 9:40 pm Chuckman wrote: Her giblets quiver for the Lesser Ikari.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Dec 24, 2014 10:24 pm Chuckman wrote: Her giblets quiver for the Lesser Ikari. None other will suffice.

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Wed Dec 24, 2014 11:20 pm Sorrow wrote: I believe it's generally agreed that she'd rather be spending time with Shinji, despite what she may say. She's just more interested in him being interested in her, than she is interested in someone who is interested in her. It's just not as interesting.

[]: Re: Asuka's Date             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Dec 25, 2014 4:18 am Tumbling Down wrote: I'm sure there's something more significant to it than just Asuka being a jerk.

[]:             Quote Post by Atropos » Thu Dec 25, 2014 8:11 am More like the world's third best Eva pilot, amirite?

[]:             Quote Post by fizz450_03 » Thu Dec 25, 2014 5:38 pm Chuckman speaks the truth Atropos wrote: More like the world's third best Eva pilot, amirite?

[]:             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Fri Dec 26, 2014 4:48 pm Ep. 15 was the highest mark Asuka and Shinji's relashionship ever got to, too bad they both screwed it up. Or good thing they did, depending on your preferences. The "other guy"was apparently not awesooome enough for Asuka. In fact, he didn't even ask her himself on a date, he asked Hikari to ask her in his place . Asuka don't like that, brah. So she ditched him. Furthermore, by then she had already got suspicious that Kaji and Misato were/had gotten back together and she didn't like not only being "left" by Kaji, but also "loosing" to Misato and being left all alone. This after a couple of episodes flirting with Shinji and getting no real response. So she decides to take the initiave and, being herself, comes up with an excuse to kiss him and get a response out of him. A pretty lame one, at that. In fact, I doubt she didn't accept Hikari's request just to get Shinji jealous and ellicit such a response from him. She also provokes him again when Shinji hesitates. However, Asuka is unconsiderate of Shinji's position (hence the nose-pinching), and Shinji is far too socially inept to know what to do. Both are confused, traumatized and stressed children. The rest is history. Or a fanfic!

[]:             Quote Post by vito » Fri Dec 26, 2014 8:41 pm (or doujinshi)

[]:             Quote Post by Jäeger » Sat Dec 27, 2014 5:17 am FelipeFritschF wrote: Ep. 15 was the highest mark Asuka and Shinji's relashionship ever got to, too bad they both screwed it up. Or good thing they did, depending on your preferences. The "other guy"was apparently not awesooome enough for Asuka. In fact, he didn't even ask her himself on a date, he asked Hikari to ask her in his place . Asuka don't like that, brah. So she ditched him. Furthermore, by then she had already got suspicious that Kaji and Misato were/had gotten back together and she didn't like not only being "left" by Kaji, but also "loosing" to Misato and being left all alone. This after a couple of episodes flirting with Shinji and getting no real response. So she decides to take the initiave and, being herself, comes up with an excuse to kiss him and get a response out of him. A pretty lame one, at that. In fact, I doubt she didn't accept Hikari's request just to get Shinji jealous and ellicit such a response from him. She also provokes him again when Shinji hesitates. However, Asuka is unconsiderate of Shinji's position (hence the nose-pinching), and Shinji is far too socially inept to know what to do. Both are confused, traumatized and stressed children. The rest is history. Or a fanfic!

[]:             Quote Post by LukeMM95 » Sun Dec 28, 2014 6:24 am I really wish we got to see a scene from that date, maybe during the mind rape sequence of Episode 22. Like perhaps just a brief clip or two of her looking bored on her date and then running away, just before the flashbacks to Eps 9 and 15, to reinforce the fact that she's only interested in Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Sun Dec 28, 2014 12:49 pm LukeMM95 wrote: I really wish we got to see a scene from that date, maybe during the mind rape sequence of Episode 22. Like perhaps just a brief clip or two of her looking bored on her date and then running away, just before the flashbacks to Eps 9 and 15, to reinforce the fact that she's only interested in Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Dec 28, 2014 11:35 pm I can actually imagine it might have been interesting, instead of bland guy and Asuka doing bland date things. Like, bland guy starts hitting on Asuka, she doesn't act interested, bland guy tries to kiss her and she dashes off... Huh. When I started writing this, I couldn't think of anything interesting; but now, the more I think, the more I realize that Anno and co. could have actually cooked up something pretty brilliant.

[]:             Quote Post by Gob Hobblin » Tue Dec 30, 2014 12:01 pm 'So, I was thinking...maybe we could go to the 'Important Cardigans Throughout History' exhibit in town today.' '...or a theme park. Theme parks are good date places, right?'

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Tue Dec 30, 2014 12:40 pm Depends on how long the lines are

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Dec 30, 2014 9:18 pm Also depends on the theme park, I think. I'd totally go on a date at Six Flags, personally. Roller Coasters FTW.

[]:             Quote Post by LukeMM95 » Wed Dec 31, 2014 9:09 am Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: Also depends on the theme park, I think. I'd totally go on a date at Six Flags, personally. Roller Coasters FTW.
